title: [EPIC] Content factory WITHOUT redeploy — dynamic article rendering
description:
THE RULE: publishing an article must NOT trigger a site rebuild. New article -> written to DB -> live via dynamic rendering in seconds. Full static rebuild is legacy/code-template-only. Treat "rebuild to publish" as a bug to remove.

Full context + design + infra + gotchas: reports/HANDOFF-no-redeploy-factory-2026-06-11.md (READ FIRST).

Why now: deploy webhook tars ALL of out/ (incl. images) and 413s past ~486 articles. Per-article rebuild is unscalable. Owner's stated MAIN goal = no-redeploy publishing.

Design (recommended): Cloudflare renderer worker serves GET /:cat/:slug/ from content_matrix (RU DB api.1001sovet.ru), full SEO HTML (Article+NewsArticle JSON-LD, canonical, max-image-preview:large, site header/footer/CSS). Caddy: serve static file if present else reverse_proxy to renderer. Article images -> R2 (out of the deploy tarball, also fixes 413). New publish path writes DB+R2, no commit/push/rebuild. Optional nightly rebuild folds DB->static for speed.

Done = publish a test article, it's live with correct SEO HTML, and NO GitHub Actions deploy fires.
notes: 2026-06-11 IMPLEMENTED & LIVE: renderer worker (workers/renderer, sovetydoma-renderer.filippmiller.workers.dev) + Caddy @dynamic fallback + publish-dynamic.mjs (DB+R2). 4 articles published dynamically, zero GH Actions. ds2/fey/8la/7b4/qo8 CLOSED. Remaining: rih (move EXISTING images out of deploy tarball — code deploys still 413, use SSH dist-stream). Known v1 limits: dynamic pages have no JS widgets (Flight payload stripped deliberately), author box + related block show template article's content (JSON-LD author is correct); both fixed by future fold-in. Memory: no-redeploy-renderer-live.md

# Agent Workflow / Release Rules

## CURRENT TRUTH

- **No-redeploy rule (owner mandate):** routine article publishing must never rebuild/redeploy the site. Dynamic path only (see Content Publishing bead). Full rebuilds are for code/template changes.
- **Never build on the VPS** (incident 2026-06-04): the VPS only serves prebuilt static files.
- **Secrets:** never commit; worker secrets only via `wrangler secret bulk` (PowerShell BOM corrupts `secret put`).
- **CI gates that fail deploys:** image audit `--fail-on-missing-previews`; SEO audit (description 70–180 chars); sitemap pagination test; style gate `validate-style.mjs --fail 6` (AI-tone). auto-publish handles previews/sitemap itself; publish-dynamic bypasses CI entirely (by design).
- **Windows env quirks:** Node prints a harmless libuv assertion on exit; CRLF warnings are noise; never pipe tsc/build output through head/tail when you need the exit code; `tsconfig` excludes `vk-miniapp` (its deps absent from root node_modules).
- **nested node_modules must stay ignored** — root .gitignore has `/node_modules` AND `node_modules/` (added 2026-06-11 after workers/renderer/node_modules briefly got committed; untracked in commit 6b70ed9a but it remains in history — do not repeat).
- **Beads is canonical memory** (this passport, epic sovetydoma-cxl). Session protocol lives in AGENTS.md.
- grok/kimi draft CLIs are broken in this environment — drafts via Claude subagents.

# Object Storage / Media

## CURRENT TRUTH

- **R2 bucket `sovetydoma-article-images`** (created 2026-06-11): images+previews of DYNAMICALLY published articles. Keys: `<filename>.jpg` and `previews/<slug>.jpg`. Served at `https://1001sovet.ru/images/...` via Caddy fallback → renderer worker R2 binding `ARTICLE_IMAGES` (no public bucket domain needed). # Content Publishing / Factory (NO-REDEPLOY)

## CURRENT TRUTH

- THE RULE: publishing/updating an article must NOT trigger a site rebuild. Treat "rebuild to publish" as a bug.
- Source of truth for articles: table `content_matrix` in the RU Supabase (see Database bead). Statuses: text_status idea→draft→approved→published; image_status generated/approved; disposition active.
- Publish path (verified live 2026-06-11): `node scripts/matrix/publish-dynamic.mjs --slugs a,b,c` (or --category/--limit; --dry-run). It generates the 240px preview (`python scripts/generate-image-previews.py --slug X`), uploads image+preview to R2 bucket `sovetydoma-article-images` via wrangler, sets the row published + `frontmatter.published_via='dynamic'` + `image_url`, logs to `content_matrix_events`. NO git operations.
- Serving: Caddy @dynamic matcher (not-a-static-file AND (12-category /:cat/:slug/ regex | /images/* | /sitemap-dynamic.xml)) → reverse_proxy to `sovetydoma-renderer.filippmiller.workers.dev`. Static files always win. Renderer transforms a live template page (TEMPLATE_URL=ekonomiya/ekonomiya-vody) with HTMLRewriter; strips ALL Next.js JS (Flight payload would re-render the template article); bakes header CSS (scripts/matrix/extract-styled-css.py → workers/renderer/src/bakedCss.ts); swaps title/meta/JSON-LD/h1/lead/TOC/author-card/date/tags/body. Bump RENDER_VERSION in workers/renderer/src/index.ts to bust the rendered-page cache.
- Image generation: fal.ai Flux Schnell via `scripts/matrix/regen-images-fal.mjs` (`--slugs` also creates never-existing images). Prompt hygiene: `lib.mjs buildImagePrompt/sanitizeImagePrompt` (no people/hands — "goblin" prevention), 1280×960.
- Drafts: grok/kimi CLIs are broken in this environment; drafts are written by Claude subagents into `.matrix-ideas/drafts/<slug>.md`, then `ingest-drafts-batch.mjs` → `promote-drafts.mjs` (300–2500 word gate).
- Dynamic pages have NO JS widgets (comments/ratings/questions show static fallbacks) until a future fold-in (DB→MDX→static) — deliberate v1 trade-off.
- `/sitemap-dynamic.xml` lists dynamic articles (frontmatter.published_via='dynamic'); referenced in public/robots.txt.

## VERIFICATION STATUS

- Status: CONFIRMED
- Last verified: 2026-06-11
- Verified by: published 4 real articles through this exact path; verified live in browser incl. visual parity; zero GitHub Actions runs fired (baseline run id 27331214462 unchanged during publishes).
- Confidence: high

## EVIDENCE

- File: `scripts/matrix/publish-dynamic.mjs`, `workers/renderer/src/*`, `docs/NO-REDEPLOY-PUBLISHING.md`
- Live articles: /dacha-i-ogorod/zadelat-dyrku-kryshe-saraya/, /dom-i-uborka/sushka-dzhinsov-veshalka-vs-gorizontalno/, /dacha-i-ogorod/vysota-drovyanika-okno-bani/, /dacha-i-ogorod/razmery-drovyanik-naves-zashchita-solntse/

## ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES / SECRET LOCATIONS

- `FAL_KEY` (or `FAL_API_KEY`) — in local `.env.local`; image generation.
- `SUPABASE_URL`, `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` — local `.env.local` (scripts) + Cloudflare worker secret (renderer).

## PROCEDURES

- Publish N approved articles: optionally `regen-images-fal.mjs --slugs ...` → `publish-dynamic.mjs --slugs ...` → curl-verify the URLs → done. Must NOT trigger any GH Actions run.
- After changing the renderer: `npx tsc --noEmit` in workers/renderer → bump RENDER_VERSION → `npx wrangler deploy` → test with a FRESH slug (cache!).
- After site header/layout component changes: re-run `python scripts/matrix/extract-styled-css.py` and redeploy renderer.

# Production / Deploy / Hosting

## CURRENT TRUTH

- Production site: https://1001sovet.ru — static export (Next.js 16 `output:'export'`) served by **Caddy** on VPS **89.169.44.37** (Timeweb, RU) from `/srv/apps/1001sovet/current` (symlink to a release dir). The VPS never builds.
- **Articles publish WITHOUT redeploy**: dynamic renderer worker `sovetydoma-renderer` (Cloudflare, workers/renderer/) serves DB-only articles via Caddy fallback. See child bead "Content Publishing" + docs/NO-REDEPLOY-PUBLISHING.md. Full rebuild is for code/template changes ONLY.
- Code deploy path: push to master → GH Actions "Build & publish static site to dist" builds `out/`, pushes `dist` branch, then POSTs tarball to `https://1001sovet.ru/__deploy/upload` (Caddy → 127.0.0.1:9101). **This webhook currently 413s** (tarball includes ~486 images; Caddy body cap 600MB exceeded by tar of out/). 
- Working deploy workaround (verified 2026-06-11): `git fetch origin dist && git archive origin/dist | ssh -i ~/.ssh/timeweb_1001sovet root@89.169.44.37 "mkdir -p /srv/apps/1001sovet/rel-<ts> && tar -x -C /srv/apps/1001sovet/rel-<ts> && ln -sfn /srv/apps/1001sovet/rel-<ts> /srv/apps/1001sovet/current.new && mv -Tf /srv/apps/1001sovet/current.new /srv/apps/1001sovet/current"`.
- Cloudflare Workers deploy: `cd workers/<name> && npx wrangler deploy`. Secrets ONLY via `wrangler secret bulk <json>` (PowerShell pipe into `secret put` corrupts values with a BOM).
- SSH access: `ssh -i ~/.ssh/timeweb_1001sovet root@89.169.44.37`.
- Caddyfile: `/etc/caddy/Caddyfile` on the VPS (backups `/etc/caddy/Caddyfile.bak-*`). 1001sovet vhost has: /__deploy/* → :9101, /vk-app/* → vk-miniapp, @dynamic matcher → renderer worker, else static.

## VERIFICATION STATUS

- Status: CONFIRMED
- Last verified: 2026-06-11
- Verified by: live SSH deploy performed this date; GH run 27336377368 failed at webhook step (413) and run 27336399237 same; Caddyfile read+modified live; renderer worker deployed and tested in browser.
- Confidence: high

## EVIDENCE

- File: `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`
- File: `docs/NO-REDEPLOY-PUBLISHING.md`
- File: `workers/renderer/wrangler.toml`
- Command: `ssh root@89.169.44.37 "cat /etc/caddy/Caddyfile"` (2026-06-11)
- GH runs: 27336377368 (failure at "Activate production via deploy webhook"), 27336399235 (CI success)
- Commits: 42bf1e2a, fee1a5c63

## ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES / SECRET LOCATIONS

- SSH key: `~/.ssh/timeweb_1001sovet` (local machine; never commit).
- Worker secrets: `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` (renderer + others) — set via `wrangler secret bulk`; value lives in local `.env.local` and Cloudflare, never in repo.

## PROCEDURES

- Code deploy: commit → push master → wait for "Build & publish static site to dist" to push `dist` → SSH dist-stream (command above) until the 413 is fixed (bead sovetydoma-rih).
- Article publish: NEVER via deploy. Use `node scripts/matrix/publish-dynamic.mjs` (see Content Publishing bead).
- Caddy change: always `cp Caddyfile Caddyfile.bak-<tag>-$(date)` → edit → `caddy validate --config /etc/caddy/Caddyfile` → `systemctl reload caddy`.

## DEPRECATED / SUPERSEDED

- SUPERSEDED 2026-06-11: "publish articles by committing MDX + rebuild (`scripts/matrix/auto-publish.mjs`)". Replaced by dynamic publish path (publish-dynamic.mjs). auto-publish remains only for fold-in/legacy. Evidence: docs/NO-REDEPLOY-PUBLISHING.md, epic sovetydoma-289.
- SUPERSEDED ~2026-06: deploy webhook as the working activation path — currently 413s at ~486 articles; SSH dist-stream is the working path until images leave the tarball (bead sovetydoma-rih).

## OPEN QUESTIONS / NEEDS VERIFICATION

comments.author: SovetыDoma Dev
comments.text:
Efficiency audit findings 2026-06-10:
1. HIGH: build re-parses all 429 MDX ~5x (validate, article-index, sitemap, rss, next). Shared cached loader -> save ~5-8s/build.
2. HIGH: vk-publication-index.json ~2.8MB bundled into subscriptions worker -> move to KV/R2 or Supabase query (-750-900KB gzip).
3. MED: CI lacks .next cache; tests run serial -> ~2-4 CI min savings.
4. MED: public/images = 99MB, 860 JPG, no WebP/AVIF; .sources.json 7.6MB tracked in git.
5. LOW: tracked artifacts (.matrix-ideas 9MB, .beads 6MB, .sources.json) -> gitignore (~15-20MB).
6. LOW-MED: next staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=2 -> raise to 8 in CI (-20-40s).
7. LOW-MED: parallelize test scripts.
8. deps clean, no bloat.
Total potential: local build -20-30%, CI -4-8min, repo -15-20MB.
